title: Subtyping baselines (fit-on-train-only) + class-correct metrics + optimism-gap report
context: The subtyping benchmark (task 007) and full leakage-audit suite (task 008) are the prerequisites for training baseline models. Baselines in this project are not intended to achieve state-of-the-art performance — they exist to make the benchmark honest and to establish a reproducible reference point. All preprocessing must be fit on training folds only, enforced by the leakage-audit suite. Metrics must be class-imbalance-aware. The critical output is the optimism gap: the difference between internal cross-validation and external-cohort performance, reported per benchmark as the project's signature honesty metric.
objective: Implement baseline subtyping classifiers trained fit-on-train-only (all preprocessing fit on training folds, enforced by the leakage-audit suite), scored with class-correct metrics (balanced accuracy, macro-F1, AUROC/AUPRC with confidence intervals) on both internal CV folds and the declared external validation cohort, and report the optimism gap (internal-CV minus external-cohort performance) with all numbers carrying the (code version, data version, split hash) provenance triple.
acceptanceCriteria: Baseline classifiers are trained with all preprocessing (scaling, imputation, feature selection, normalization) fit on training folds only; no leakage-audit check fails in CI for the baseline training pipeline
Metrics reported for subtyping: balanced accuracy, macro-F1, AUROC/AUPRC with confidence intervals; naive (accuracy only, class-imbalance-ignoring) metrics are not used as primary metrics

Results reported on both internal cross-validation folds and the declared external validation cohort; the optimism gap (internal-CV minus external-cohort metric) is computed and reported per metric per baseline
Every reported number carries the (code version, data version, split hash) provenance triple, making each result traceable to its computation
The baseline training and evaluation pipeline is reproducible: the same seeds, pinned environment, and split hashes produce identical numbers
Domain reviewer and technical reviewer sign-off on the baseline implementation and the reported metrics are recorded
output: A merged PR delivering subtyping baseline implementations with fit-on-train-only preprocessing, class-correct metrics on internal CV and external cohort, optimism-gap report, and provenance triples on every number — the first honest benchmark result.
